* This is a netbeans project.
* Don't destroy netbeans comment markers in java files.
* don't access folder data
* building is done via maven
* for python use .venv
* The FrameWork source code is at ../FrameWork


* mark every class, or function your are generating as: generated by AI (write version and name)

* When asked to create a new dialog, list view, CRUD screen, or menu entry in the Daten menu, use the skill at `.github/skills/netbeans-dialog/SKILL.md`.
